case_title: FAMOUS CITY LIMO VS. LEO CHANCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $630.00 FILED BY FAMOUS CITY LIMO AS TO DEFENDANT CHANCO, LEO DBA RTC CAR SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF . SHERIFF SUBMITTED AN AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE (DEFT'S LAST NAME WAS MISSPELLED). THE AMENDED POS WAS RECEIVED BEFORE THE ERRONEOUS POS. SERVED DEC-14-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHANCO, LEO DBA RTC CAR SERVICE
DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
